hero.title: Welcome to Jain Hostel Management
hero.subtitle: Providing quality accommodation and education support for the Jain community since 1940

values.title: Our Values & Mission
values.subtitle: Committed to providing safe, comfortable, and spiritually enriching accommodation
values.communityFirstDesc: Building a supportive Jain community through shared values and mutual respect
values.educationalSupportDesc: Fostering academic excellence with study facilities and mentorship programs
values.culturalValuesDesc: Upholding Jain principles and traditions through daily practices and spiritual activities

discipline.title: Discipline & Safety
discipline.subtitle: Maintaining high standards of conduct and safety for all residents
discipline.timelyScheduleDesc: Fixed timings for meals, studies, and lights out
discipline.securityDesc: Professional security staff and CCTV monitoring
discipline.codeOfConductDesc: Strict adherence to hostel rules and regulations
discipline.medicalCareDesc: First-aid facilities and tie-ups with nearby hospitals

amenities.title: Modern Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Well-equipped facilities for comfortable living and holistic development
amenities.libraryDesc: Quiet study spaces with extensive book collection
amenities.messDiningDesc: Nutritious vegetarian meals with Jain dietary compliance
amenities.wifiDesc: High-speed internet connectivity throughout the premises

choosePath.title: Choose Your Path
choosePath.subtitle: Select the accommodation type that best suits your needs
choosePath.boysHostelDesc: Modern accommodation for male students with focus on academic excellence and character building
choosePath.girlsAshramDesc: Safe and nurturing environment for female students with emphasis on holistic development
choosePath.dharamshalaDesc: Spiritual retreat and temporary accommodation for pilgrims and visitors seeking peaceful stay

admissionProcess.title: Admission Process
admissionProcess.subtitle: Simple and transparent admission journey from application to check-in
admissionProcess.step1DescLong: Submit online application with required documents
admissionProcess.step5DescLong: Payment of fees and security deposit

announcements.title: Announcements & Notices
announcements.notice1Title: Last Date for Boys Hostel Applications Extended
announcements.notice1Desc: Application deadline for Boys Hostel admissions extended to December 31, 2025. Apply now to secure your spot.
announcements.notice2Desc: Shortlisted candidates for Girls Ashram will be interviewed from January 5-7, 2025. Check your application status for details.
announcements.notice3Desc: Our expanded library facility with 24/7 study access will open from January 15, 2025 for all residents.
announcements.notice4Desc: Hostel will remain closed from December 25 to January 2, 2026. All residents must vacate by December 24.

cta.title: Begin Your Journey With Us
cta.subtitle: Join our community of learners and experience quality accommodation with spiritual growth
cta.needHelp: Need help? Contact our admissions team at +91 22 2414 1234

footer.trustDescription: Serving the Jain community through education, shelter, and spiritual welfare since 1940.
footer.address: 148, Lamington Road, Opp. Navjivan Society, Grant Road (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra – 400007
footer.supportDescription: Your generous donations help us continue our service to the community.
